summary: Retailer Activity Dashboard - All 25 backend tests pass, Frontend UI fully functional with 3 tabs (Overview, Abandoned Carts, Self-Pickup Report), retailer detail modal, and sidebar navigation

Backend APIs.GET /api/admin/retailers/activity-dashbo: PASSED - Returns summary stats, retailers list with rank, abandoned carts, pickups, items, revenue
Backend APIs.GET /api/admin/retailers/{id}/activity: PASSED - Returns retailer detail with 90-day performance, monthly trends (6 months), abandoned carts, pickup orders
Backend APIs.GET /api/admin/retailers/abandoned-carts: PASSED - Returns abandoned cart list with pagination and filter by retailer
Backend APIs.GET /api/admin/retailers/self-pickup-rep: PASSED - Returns leaderboard with period filters (month, quarter, year, all) and star eligibility
Backend APIs.Authentication: PASSED - All endpoints require admin auth (401/403 without)

Frontend UI.Sidebar Navigation: PASSED - 'Retailer Activity' nav item present and highlighted
Frontend UI.Summary Cards: PASSED - Shows Active Retailers (4), Star Eligible (0), Abandoned Carts 30d (0), Pickups Completed (0)
Frontend UI.Overview Tab: PASSED - Shows retailer table with Rank, Retailer, Abandoned, Pickups, Items, Revenue, Status, Action columns
Frontend UI.Abandoned Carts Tab: PASSED - Shows Abandoned Carts Summary and table with Lost Value, Conversion Rate columns
Frontend UI.Self-Pickup Report Tab: PASSED - Shows period filter (month/quarter/year/all), Star Retailer Criteria, leaderboard table
Frontend UI.Retailer Detail Modal: PASSED - Shows 90-Day Performance, Monthly Trends chart (6 months), Abandoned Carts, Pickup Orders sections

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Star Retailer criteria correctly set at 50+ items in 90 days
✓ All activity dashboard endpoints properly protected with admin auth
✓ Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
✓ All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Period filters work correctly for self-pickup report
✓ Monthly trends showing 6 months of data in modal
✓ Database has 4 retailers but 0 pickup orders (expected - stats all show 0)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Retailer Activity Dashboard fully functional. Backend has 4 new API endpoints under /api/admin/retailers/: activity-dashboard, {id}/activity, abandoned-carts, self-pickup-report. Frontend page at /admin/retailer-activity with 3 tabs. Database has 4 retailers but no store_pickup orders yet, so all pickup stats are 0. Star Retailer eligibility = 50+ items fulfilled via self-pickup in 90 days.
